positive: A vibrant, highly stylized abstract geometric illustration featuring celestial elements and stylized mountain peaks. The composition should be radially symmetric, centered, and utilize negative space effectively. Key elements include glowing constellations, simplified mountain silhouettes rendered in deep indigo and sapphire blue, contrasted sharply against bursts of bioluminescent neon cyan, magenta, and emerald green. The style should be a seamless blend of vaporwave aesthetics and minimalist vector art, with clean linework and high saturation. Perfect for printing on dark apparel. Aspect ratio must be square, emphasizing strong silhouettes and graphic impact. Intricate detail, high contrast.
negative: blurry, grainy, noise, watermark, text, logo, signature, debris, poor anatomy, low detail, photorealism, cluttered, messy, jpeg artifacts
